ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor from which the data is collected */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine from which the data is collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "x" REAL /* X position of the sensor reading */,
  "y" REAL /* Y position of the sensor reading */,
  "theta" REAL /* Orientation of the sensor in radians */,
  "wc" INTEGER /* Pressure or weight condition */,
  "df" REAL /* Force reading from the sensor */,
  "dr" REAL /* Rate measurement from the sensor */,
  "gyro" REAL /* Gyroscopic reading from the sensor */,
  "hx" REAL /* Sensor reading in X direction */,
  "hy" REAL /* Sensor reading in Y direction */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data record (e.g., active, flagged, deleted) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor readings */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., position, pressure, gyroscope) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor in the factory */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor needs to be calibrated */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor or machine maintained */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Description or message related to the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_category" TEXT /* Category of the alert (e.g., performance, safety) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor for which the analysis is performed */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine for which the analysis is performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis activity */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis (e.g., calculated average force) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the analysis */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sensor malfunction, maintenance performed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine related to the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the event */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time when the event was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
